steps.title: Notice the expression being asked for
steps.content: The question asks for $x-9$. The left side $5x-45$ can be factored as $5(x-9)$, so you can get $x-9$ without solving for $x$ first.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A — $-30$ is the value of $5x-45$, not $x-9$. The requested expression is $x-9$, and its value is $-6$.
